charges.offence_description: Break and enter and commit indictable offence

agreed_facts.narrative: Counsel and Crown have agreed on a statement of facts dated 2026-04-20.

per_charge.attestation_text: I admit the essential elements of count 1 as set out in the agreed facts.

voluntariness.attestation_text: I am pleading guilty voluntarily; no threats, no inducements other than what is on the record, and I am not under the influence of any substance that affects my judgment.

consequences_acknowledged.attestation_text: I understand a conviction will be entered, the court will impose a sentence, and the conviction will appear on my criminal record.

court_not_bound_acknowledged.attestation_text: I understand the court is not bound by any sentence agreement; the public-interest test in R. v. Anthony-Cook, 2016 SCC 43 applies before any departure.

waivers.attestation_text: I waive my right to be presumed innocent.
I waive my right to require the Crown to prove every element beyond a reasonable doubt.
I waive my right to test the Crown evidence by cross-examination.
I waive my right to call defence evidence including testifying myself.
I waive my right to remain silent.
I waive my right to elect the forum for trial where applicable.

sentencing_range_discussed.attestation_text: Counsel discussed the range; I understand the discussed range is a prediction, not a guarantee, and the judge may impose a different sentence subject to the Anthony-Cook test.

immigration.attestation_text: Counsel reviewed; not applicable as accused is a Canadian citizen.

employment_licensing.attestation_text: Counsel reviewed potential employment and licensing impact, including any disclosure obligations.

firearms_prohibition.attestation_text: Counsel reviewed s. 110 discretionary firearms prohibition.

soira_registration.attestation_text: Not a designated sexual offence; SOIRA does not apply.

travel_us.attestation_text: I understand US entry may be barred under US immigration law.

driving_prohibition.attestation_text: Not a driving-related offence; no driving prohibition applies.

family_cps_implications.attestation_text: No current family-court or child-protection implications.

appeal_rights_acknowledged.attestation_text: I understand appeal from a guilty plea is limited; I retain the right to appeal sentence subject to leave.

diversion.why_not_pursued: Crown did not consent to diversion.

peace_bond_810.why_not_pursued: Substantive offence; Crown did not propose peace bond.

discharge_730_absolute.why_not_pursued: Crown opposed; range not appropriate to absolute discharge.

discharge_730_conditional.why_not_pursued: Crown opposed conditional discharge as well.

trial.why_not_pursued: Accused chose to plead guilty after weighing alternatives.

final_instruction_to_plead.attestation_text: I instruct counsel to enter a plea of guilty to count 1 on 2026-05-15.
